title: Beef Pho
ingredients: Bean sprouts, basil, lime for serving
instructions: Simmer bones with spices for 6 hours.
Assemble bowls with broth, noodles, meat.

reviews.text: Authentic taste! Added a splash of fish sauce and a pinch of sugar. Added a dash of hoisin sauce and squeeze of lime before eating.
Used chicken broth instead of beef. Added extra cinnamon and a pinch of star anise. Topped with sliced jalapenos.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
